title: Module CONTRACT
description: Machine-readable metadata for a code module (CONTRACT.yaml). Kind-discriminated contracts align with reference/schemas-extended/ slices.

inputs.description: Structured declared inputs (name/description rows); optional schemaRef ties rows to JSON Schema.

extensions.description: Namespaced extensions; keys must not collide with chassis top-level reserved names.

^x-[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$.description: Vendor extension namespace. Values must be objects.

ui_taxonomy.description: UI taxonomy for component contracts (distinct from CONTRACT.kind).

items.description: Structured UI metadata is intentionally open until Wave 2 narrows component slices; prefer referencing design-system tokens over ad hoc maps.
